messages.name: Honore Nshuti
messages.message: Amazing work, Remy William! Your porting layouts and custom systems speed are top-notch. Love seeing Level 5 student results this visual.

personalInfo.title: Software Developer • ICT Specialist • Tech Visionary
personalInfo.shortBio: Born in 2009 • Final-year Level 5 Software Development student and tech prodigy from Rwanda 🇷🇼, building highly immersive web systems, responsive cinematic platforms, and secure APIs.
personalInfo.longBio: I am Bizimana Ngabo Remy William, an ambitious, forward-thinking Software Developer born in 2009. Currently finalizing my Level 5 Software Development certification in Rwanda, I pair deep programming principles with advanced application UI/UX designs. My ultimate vision is to create high-impact software systems that streamline commerce, entertainment, and digital security within East Africa and globally.

projectsData.title: FastMovie Website
projectsData.description: An premium cinematic exploration hub styled with high contrast dark designs, glowing capsule layouts, and interactive real-time movie content hubs.

projectsData.title: Movie & Series Platform
projectsData.description: A dynamic database search hub integrating cinematic search queries, detailed cast profiles, user favorited playlists, and IMDB score reviews.

projectsData.title: Interactive Admin Dashboard
projectsData.description: A futuristic glassmorphic command center compiling reactive statistics charts, user tracking tables, theme settings, and active task progress metrics.

projectsData.title: JWT Token Security System
projectsData.description: A production-ready secure authentication gateway utilizing JSON Web Tokens, salt hashing, session control, and access levels.

projectsData.title: Futuristic Portfolio
projectsData.description: This current personal platform built to highlight credentials with sleek glassmorphism, high contrast themes, and optimized layout elements.

projectsData.title: Full Stack CRUD App
projectsData.description: A comprehensive multi-user management tracker with real-time editing, schema validations, query filtering, and smooth state updates.

timelineData.title: ICT Foundations & Hardware
timelineData.subtitle: Academic Induction & System Integration
timelineData.description: Initiated Level 5 Software Development studies, mastering network structures, hardware assemblies, logic operations, standard algorithm patterns, and database basics.

timelineData.title: Frontend Engineering Core
timelineData.subtitle: Responsive Interfaces & UX Guidelines
timelineData.description: Deep-dived into core web architectures - writing semantic HTML5, highly scalable CSS3 structures, fluid layouts with Tailwind CSS, and DOM programming with local Javascript states.

timelineData.title: Dynamic React Applications
timelineData.subtitle: State Handlers, Route Systems & Components
timelineData.description: Advanced to UI development frameworks, implementing modern React hooks, modular layouts, async rest query structures, and animated feedback interfaces with Framer Motion.

timelineData.title: Robust Backends & API Security
timelineData.subtitle: Node Servers, Express Routers & DB Architectures
timelineData.description: Evolving as a final-year software developer with comprehensive server-side logic in Node.js and Express.js, state-saving databases with MySQL / MongoDB, and tokenized JWT security gateways.
